entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop (Pennisetum americanum) affected by leafspot disease in Zimbabwe

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the leafspot disease of pearl millet was investigated

entities.name: LEAFSPOT DISEASE
entities.description: A disease causing foliar leafspots and streaks on pearl millet

entities.name: KOCH'S POSTULATES
entities.description: A method used to investigate the aetiology of the leafspot disease

entities.name: BIPOLARIS SP.
entities.description: A fungus isolated from lesions of pearl millet

entities.name: EXSEROHILUM SP.
entities.description: A fungus isolated from lesions of pearl millet

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Microorganisms isolated from lesions that produced original symptoms in pearl millet

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL AND PHYSIOLOGICAL TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to identify the bacterial isolate

entities.name: LOPAT
entities.description: A specific biochemical test used to identify the fluorescent pseudomonad

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS SYRINGAE
entities.description: A fluorescent pseudomonad identified as the cause of leafspot disease on pearl millet

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the first report of P. syringae on pearl millet occurred
